summary: Implemented the CM-0023 four-stage queue freshness witness contract as a fail-closed reusable validator with adversarial tests.

claim_states.observed: The narrative freshness contract existed before this run without an executable validator.
claim_states.inferred: Machine validation materially reduces stale-witness acceptance risk.
claim_states.proposed: Require this validator in any future authorized queue reconciliation workflow.
claim_states.superseded: Narrative-only witness review as sufficient enforcement.
claim_states.unresolved: Recursive tree-digest generation and cryptographic reviewer authorization remain unimplemented.

next_action: Implement a deterministic recursive operations/queue-updates inventory and SHA-256 tree digest generator, then bind its output directly into proposal, review, and application witnesses.
